title: Spring the Discovery
subtitle: Unleash a discovered check to win the queen
summary: Your rook is lined up on the enemy king behind your knight. Move the knight with a threat and the check comes for free.

body.goal: Move the knight so it attacks the queen while the rook delivers check, win the queen, and convert.
body.successHint: Nf4+ hits the queen on h5 and uncovers the rook's check at the same time — the king must move first.
